allow: PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $procs = $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique; foreach \($p in $procs\) { Write-Output "Stopping PID $p \($\(\(Get-Process -Id $p\).ProcessName\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id $p -Force } } else { Write-Output "Nothing listening on 8081" })
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(t['public_url']\) for t in d['tunnels']]")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force; Write-Output "stopped $_" } } else { "nothing on 8081" })
